question: Will Jerome Powell cease to hold the office of Chair of the Federal Reserve before 2026?
resolution_criteria:
From the ACX 2025 Prediction Contest:

(https://www.metaculus.com/questions/embed/31045)Will resolve according to the Metaculus resolution:

This question will resolve as Yes if, before January 1, 2026, Eastern Time, Jerome Powell is no longer the Chair of the Federal Reserve.
